hypothesis_en: Mr President, Mr Patten, you have defined these agreements in two words: geostrategy and transitional, and I must thank you for your frankness, because in one way or another these two concepts are somewhat contradictory. The current situation of our relations with these countries, which I would say, in addition to the words you have used, is currently unsatisfactory. Colombia, Venezuela, Ecuador, Peru and Bolivia, to a greater or lesser extent, for one reason or another, are living in very difficult times that have prevented the processes of their own regional integration, which has not facilitated the progress of our relations with them. I hope that, if the forecasts are met, the Mercosur dialogue agreement, which would be added to the existing ones with Chile and Mexico, will be signed. I would like to ask the Commissioner whether he is aware of the fact that the Commission has already made a number of proposals to the Council and the European Parliament on this subject.
reference_en: thank you President thanks to Mr Patten (1.22) you drew up these agreements and regard= referred to them as being transitional and I'd like to thank you for your honesty because (2.9) these concepts are contradictory to a certain extent and now we're discussing the political dialogue and cooperation between the EU and Latin America and Central America and the Andean countries and these set a good example of the present situation of our relations with these countries which in addition to the words you used I would say the situation is dissatisfactory at present this is a political dialogue and cooperation agreement but we're not making progress in our trade relations and really our relations with this part of the world have not enabled us to make progress in the last few years in the extent to which we wanted the crisis of the Andean countries and the (1.69) region have not facilitated an extension of relations either Colombia Venezuela Bolivia and Peru (1.47) for various reasons are experiencing difficult times which have not ~en_abled their own regional integration and that has not permitted a development of relations with them and the same is true of Central America where large sectors of the population particularly young people (1.01) are living in a situation of marginalisation and gradual delinquency as a consequence of their own social marginalisation and this is becoming a very serious problem for these small countries in Central America and I hope (1.16) that if we stick to the forecasts of dialogue and Mercosur with Chile and Mexico then the other regions can also benefit from more ambitious agreements (2.58) which unfortunately this committee and this Parliament will not be having a look at thank you
source_es: gracias señor Presidente gracias señor Patten ha definido usted este estos acuerdos con dos palabras geostrategia y transitorio y yo debo agradecer su franqueza porque de una u otra manera estos dos conceptos son en cierta forma contradictorios este debate sobre los Acuerdos de Diálogo Político y de Cooperación entre la Unión Europea con América Central y con la Comunidad Andina representan un buen ejemplo de la situación actual de nuestras relaciones con estos países que yo además de las palabras que usted ha empleado diría es actualmente insatisfactoria se trata de un Acuerdo de Diálogo Político y de Cooperación pero no avanzamos en nuestras relaciones comerciales realmente nuestras relaciones con estas zonas del mundo no han experimentado avances durante los últimos años en la medida que hubiera deseado este Parlamento la crisis de los países de la región andina en su conjunto y de la totalidad de ellos en en de cada uno de sus miembros tampoco ha facilitado la intensificación de estas relaciones Colombia Venezuela Ecuador Perú y Bolivia en mayor o menor medida por unas u otras razones viven momentos muy difíciles que han impedido los procesos de su propia integración ~surreegional lo que no ha facilitado un avance de nuestras relaciones con ellos lo mismo vale decir para América Central donde grandes sectores de su población especialmente jóvenes en una situación de marginación y de delincuencia progresiva como consecuencia de su propia marginación social se convierten en un problema ~a_cuciante para estos pequeños estados de América Central espero que a punto de firmarse si se cumplen las previsiones del diálogo con Mercosur que se s= el acuerdo con Mercosur que se sumaría a los ya vigentes con Chile y con México estas dos regiones puedan beneficiarse de unos acuerdos más ambiciosos que ya no serán vistos por desgracia por esta Comisión y por esto y por este y por este Parlamento y que serán los que no sucedan quienes recojan esos frutos gracias señor Presidente
